label: Provider experience
quote: I've worked with CosmicGuard, Path.net, NeoProtect, TCPShield, Cloudflare, Gcore, Evolution Host, OVH, and many other providers to put together DDoS-protected solutions that actually make sense. On the software and operations side, I also enjoy working with stacks like Wazuh, Wisp.gg, Pterodactyl, Pelican Panel, Kubernetes, Fortinet firewalls, Sophos firewalls, and technologies like XDP.
